text:
The user is asking whether I read all the materials or just extracted topics. Let me clarify what I did:

1. I used `pdftotext` to extract text content from the PDF files
2. I used `unzip` to extract and process the DOCX file
3. I then read all the extracted text files using the `read` tool
4. After reading the complete content, I created the comprehensive context file

So yes, I did read all the materials - not just topics. I extracted the full text from each file and read it before organizing it into the IEC_Context.md file.

I should clarify this to the user.
